finding: Three sessions in the artcraft repo (an external AI art IDE) were spent repeatedly doing git pull, build, and run cycles with no development contributions or modifications. This work does not visibly connect to any stated goal — it is not harness-driven app development, exocortex work, NixOS setup, or positive-sum tech. It may be casual tool evaluation or personal interest, which is fine, but if it recurs it may be worth either adding creative tooling to goals or noting it as intentional exploration.
